heading: Adjustment of water right charges as final adjudication on projects and divisions named
label: 423g Adjustment of water right charges as final adjudication on projects and divisions named
text: The adjustments under sections 1 to 40, inclusive, of the Act of Congress of , 44 Statutes 636, are declared to be an incident of the operation of the “reclamation law,” a final adjudication on the projects and divisions named in such sections under the authority contained in , and shall not after , be construed to be the basis of reimbursement to the “reclamation fund” from the general fund of the Treasury or by the diversion to the “reclamation fund” of revenue of the United States not on , required by law to be credited to such “reclamation fund.”May 25, 1926May 25, 1926May 25, 1926section 466 of this title
notes: References in TextSections 1 to 40 of the Act of , referred to in text, are not classified to the Code.May 25, 1926The reclamation law, referred to in text, probably means , , as amended, popularly known as the Reclamation Act, which is classified generally to this chapter.
